title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, and polling in practice
meta_description: Cut cloud costs 75% with SSE instead of WebSocket — latency, CPU, and $/month numbers from 10 k users on a $12 droplet in 2026
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $8k+ on real-time tech without measuring latency or CPU.

They pick WebSocket because it sounds real-time.

Here is what actually paid off 👇
